---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A one or two sentence description of the feature.

## Motivation

Why is this needed? What problem does it solve? Link any related issues or discussions.

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like this implemented. Be as specific as you can about:

- API changes (new endpoints, request/response shape)
- Infrastructure changes (new AWS resources, Terraform modules)
- CI/CD changes (new workflow steps or jobs)
- Application changes (models, services, config)

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider and why did you rule them out?

## Acceptance Criteria

What does "done" look like for this feature?

- [ ]
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Additional Context

Any diagrams, references, or prior art.
